drop.invalid: No supported vault notes or folders found.

rewind.confirmMessage: Rewind to this point? File changes after this message may be overwritten or removed. This cannot be undone.
rewind.confirmMessageConflicts:
Rewind to this point? {count} file(s) were modified outside the agent and will be overwritten:
{files}
rewind.confirmMessageConversationOnly: Rewind conversation to this point? File changes will be kept.
rewind.inProgress: Please wait for the current rewind to finish.
rewind.noticeSaveFailed: Rewound: {count} file(s) reverted, but failed to save state: {error}
rewind.noticeConversationOnlySaveFailed: Rewound conversation, but failed to save state: {error}

fork.unavailableNoResponse: Cannot fork: no response to fork from
fork.commandNoMessages: Cannot fork: no messages in conversation
fork.commandNoAssistantUuid: Cannot fork: no assistant response with identifiers

fileMenu.failed: Failed to add file to Codian.

userName.name: What should Codian call you?
userName.desc: Your name for personalized greetings (leave empty for generic greetings)

excludedTags.name: Excluded tags
excludedTags.desc: Notes with these tags will not auto-load as context (one per line, without #)

mediaFolder.name: Media folder
mediaFolder.desc: Folder containing attachments/images. When notes use ![[image.jpg]], Claude will look here. Leave empty for vault root.

systemPrompt.name: Custom system prompt
systemPrompt.desc: Additional instructions appended to the default system prompt

autoTitle.name: Auto-generate conversation titles
autoTitle.desc: Automatically generate conversation titles after the first user message is sent.

titleModel.name: Title generation model
titleModel.desc: Model used for auto-generating conversation titles.

navMappings.name: Vim-style navigation mappings
navMappings.desc: One mapping per line. Format: "map <key> <action>" (actions: scrollUp, scrollDown, focusInput).

requireCommandOrControlEnterToSend.name: Require Command/Ctrl+Enter to send
requireCommandOrControlEnterToSend.desc: When enabled, Enter inserts a newline. Command+Enter sends on macOS; Ctrl+Enter sends on Windows and Linux.

slashCommands.name: Commands and Skills
slashCommands.desc: Manage vault-level commands and skills stored in .claude/commands/ and .claude/skills/. Triggered by /name.

hiddenSlashCommands.name: Hidden Commands and Skills
hiddenSlashCommands.desc: Hide specific commands and skills from the dropdown. Useful for hiding Claude Code entries that are not relevant to Claudian. Enter names without the leading slash, one per line.

mcpServers.name: MCP Servers
mcpServers.desc: Manage vault-level MCP server configurations stored in .claude/mcp.json. Servers with context-saving mode require @mention to activate.

plugins.name: Claude Code Plugins
plugins.desc: Manage Claude Code extensions discovered from ~/.claude/plugins. Enabled extensions are stored per vault in .claude/settings.json.

manager.label: Claude Code extensions
manager.empty: No Claude Code extensions found. Enable them with the Claude CLI.
manager.restartFailed: Extension changed, but some tabs failed to restart.
manager.rollbackFailed: Failed to roll back extension change: {message}

subagents.name: Subagents
subagents.desc: Manage vault-level subagents stored in .claude/agents/. Each Markdown file defines one custom agent.
subagents.noAgents: No subagents configured. Click + to create one.
subagents.renameCleanupFailed: Warning: could not remove old file for "{name}"

modal.name: Name
modal.nameDesc: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Reviews code for bugs and style
modal.toolsDesc: Comma-separated list of allowed tools (empty = all)
modal.disallowedToolsDesc: Comma-separated list of tools to disallow
modal.promptPlaceholder: You are a code reviewer. Analyze the given code for...

loadUserSettings.name: Load user Claude settings
loadUserSettings.desc: Load ~/.claude/settings.json. When enabled, user's Claude Code permission rules may bypass Safe mode.

claudeSafeMode.name: Default execution permissions
claudeSafeMode.desc: Default execution permissions used when the Safe toggle is active.

codexSafeMode.name: File access range
codexSafeMode.desc: Filesystem sandbox used when the Safe toggle is active.

customVariables.name: Custom variables
customVariables.desc: Environment variables for Claude SDK (KEY=VALUE format, one per line). Shell export prefix supported.

envSnippets.name: Snippets
envSnippets.noSnippets: No saved environment snippets yet. Click + to save your current environment configuration.
envSnippets.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the snippet

modal.name: Name
modal.namePlaceholder: A descriptive name for this environment configuration
modal.envVarsPlaceholder: KEY=VALUE format, one per line (export prefix supported)

customModelOverrides.name: Custom model overrides
customModelOverrides.desc: Set model selector aliases and context window sizes for custom models.

customContextLimits.name: Custom Context Limits
customContextLimits.desc: Set context window sizes for your custom models. Leave empty to use the default (200k tokens).
customContextLimits.invalid: Invalid format. Use: 256k, 1m, or exact count (1000-10000000).

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Claude model IDs to the picker, one per line. Environment model overrides still replace the picker.

enableChrome.name: Enable Chrome extension
enableChrome.desc: Allow Claude to interact with Chrome via the claude-in-chrome extension. Requires the extension to be installed. Requires session restart.

enableBangBash.name: Enable bash mode (!)
enableBangBash.desc: Type ! on empty input to enter bash mode. Runs commands directly via Node.js child_process. Requires view reopen.

validation.noNode: Node.js not found on PATH. Install Node.js or check your PATH configuration.

maxTabs.name: Maximum chat tabs
maxTabs.desc: Maximum number of concurrent chat tabs (3-10). Each tab uses a separate Claude session.
maxTabs.warning: More than 5 tabs may impact performance and memory usage.

enableAutoScroll.name: Auto-scroll during streaming
enableAutoScroll.desc: Automatically scroll to the bottom as Claude streams responses. Disable to stay at the top and read from the beginning.

deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.name: Defer math rendering during streaming
deferMathRenderingDuringStreaming.desc: Show raw LaTeX while responses stream, then render math once when each text block completes.

expandFileEditsByDefault.name: Expand file edits by default
expandFileEditsByDefault.desc: Show Write and Edit diffs expanded when they first appear.

chatViewPlacement.name: Open Codian in
chatViewPlacement.desc: Choose where the chat panel opens when it is created

cliPath.name: Claude CLI path
cliPath.desc: Custom path to Claude Code CLI. Leave empty for auto-detection.
cliPath.descWindows: For the native installer, use claude.exe. For npm/pnpm/yarn or other package manager installs, use the cli-wrapper.cjs path (not claude.cmd).
cliPath.descUnix: Paste the output of "which claude" — works for both native and npm/pnpm/yarn installs.

validation.isDirectory: Path is a directory, not a file

language.name: Language
language.desc: Change the display language of the plugin interface

providerEnablement.name: Enable {provider}
providerEnablement.desc: Make enabled {provider} models available for new conversations. Existing sessions are preserved when disabled.
providerEnablement.atLeastOne: At least one provider must remain enabled.

installationMethod.name: Installation method
installationMethod.desc: How Claudian should launch Codex on Windows. Native Windows uses a Windows executable path. WSL launches the Linux CLI inside a selected distro.

cliPath.name: Codex CLI path
cliPath.descUnix: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty to prefer known Codex installs, then PATH.
cliPath.descWindows: Custom path to the local Codex CLI. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH. Use the native Windows executable path, usually `codex.exe`.
cliPath.descWsl: Linux-side Codex command or absolute path to run inside WSL. Leave empty for PATH lookup inside the selected distro.

validation.wslWindowsPath: WSL mode expects a Linux command or Linux absolute path, not a Windows executable path.

wslDistroOverride.name: WSL distro override
wslDistroOverride.desc: Optional advanced override. Leave empty to infer the distro from a WSL workspace path when possible, otherwise use the default WSL distro.

customModels.name: Custom models
customModels.desc: Append additional Codex model IDs to the picker, one per line. `OPENAI_MODEL` still takes precedence when set.

reasoningSummary.name: Reasoning summary
reasoningSummary.desc: Show a summary of the model's reasoning process in the thinking block.

skills.name: Codex skills
skills.desc: Manage vault-level Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ or .agents/skills/. Home-level skills are excluded here.
skills.hiddenDesc: Hide specific Codex skills from the dropdown. Enter skill names without the leading $, one per line.

subagents.name: Codex subagents
subagents.desc: Manage vault-level Codex subagents stored in .codex/agents/. Each TOML file defines one custom agent.

mcp.descBeforeCommand: Codex manages MCP servers via its own CLI. Configure with
mcp.descAfterCommand: and they will be available in Claudian.

environment.name: Codex environment
environment.desc: Codex-owned runtime variables only. Use this for OPENAI_* and CODEX_* settings. If Codex auto-detection needs help, add its install directory to shared PATH instead of this provider section.

enableProvider.name: Enable Codex provider
enableProvider.desc: When enabled, Codex models appear in the model selector for new conversations. Existing Codex sessions are preserved.

agentSkills.sharedExpectation: Manage skills shared across all enabled providers in .agents/skills/.
agentSkills.noSkills: No shared skills configured. Click + to create one.
agentSkills.deleteFailed: Failed to move shared skill to trash: {message}
agentSkills.staleConflict: This skill changed elsewhere; refresh before saving.

modal.name: Skill name
modal.nameDesc: Lowercase letters and numbers separated by single hyphens
modal.descriptionDesc: Required portable description used by providers to select the skill
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Reviews code for correctness and maintainability
modal.instructionsPlaceholder: Review the supplied code and report actionable findings...

delete.title: Delete Shared Skill
delete.description: The entire skill folder, including scripts, references, and assets, will be moved to trash.

codexSkills.noSkills: No Codex skills in vault. Click + to create one.

modal.nameDesc: Agent name Codex uses when spawning (lowercase, hyphens, underscores)
modal.descriptionDesc: When Codex should use this agent

nicknameCandidates.name: Nickname candidates
nicknameCandidates.desc: Comma-separated display nicknames (e.g., atlas, delta, echo)

developerInstructions.name: Developer instructions
developerInstructions.desc: Core instructions that define the agent's behavior
developerInstructions.placeholder:
Review code like an owner.
Prioritize correctness, security, and missing test coverage.

validation.nameTooLong: Subagent name must be {count} characters or fewer
validation.nameInvalid: Subagent name can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
validation.nicknameInvalid: Nickname candidates can only contain ASCII letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores

codexSubagents.noAgents: No Codex subagents in vault. Click + to create one.

settingsHub.providersDesc: Connect providers and manage models, safety, and provider-specific options.
settingsHub.workspaceDesc: Manage skills, subagents, MCP, and commands while keeping provider-native files as the source of truth.
settingsHub.environmentDesc: Manage shared and provider-specific environment variables in one place.
settingsHub.unsupported: This provider does not support this settings category.
settingsHub.sharedEnvironmentDesc: Provider-neutral variables for PATH, proxies, certificates, and temporary directories.
settingsHub.resourceDesc: Unified management entry. Changes stay in provider-native files; no silent copies.

pro.title: Codian Pro
pro.freeDescription: Upgrade to unlock conversation search, Live Preview, and vault drag-and-drop.

defaultChatProvider.name: Default provider for new chats
defaultChatProvider.desc: Used for every new blank tab. Existing conversations keep their provider.

nativeAcp.cliPathDesc: Optional executable path for this computer. Leave empty to use {command} from PATH.
nativeAcp.modelManagementDesc: {provider} selects its model through the CLI. Codian does not override that selection.
nativeAcp.permissionHandlingDesc: {provider} handles permission requests through its CLI session. Codian does not expose a persistent access preset.

providerModels.searchPlaceholder: Filter by model, provider, or ID...
providerModels.aliasTitle: Custom label shown in the model selector. Leave empty to use the default.

providerCliPath.name: CLI path
providerCliPath.desc: Optional executable path to {provider} on this computer. Leave empty to use {command} from PATH.
providerCliPath.isDirectory: Path must point to a file

providerCatalog.empty: No {provider} models discovered yet. Select Discover to load models.
providerCatalog.failed: Could not load the {provider} model catalog. Check the CLI path and login state, then try again.

providerPermissions.name: Permission handling
providerPermissions.cliManagedDesc: {provider} CLI handles permission requests during the session. Codian does not override or persist its access preset.
providerPermissions.opencodeDesc: The chat permission toggle maps to an OpenCode mode and saves the current selection. This settings page has no separate default preset.
providerPermissions.piDesc: The chat permission toggle switches between read-only tools and all tools, then saves the current selection. This settings page has no separate default preset.

kimi.permissionDesc: The chat toolbar controls Safe, Auto, and Plan behavior for Kimi Code. This settings page has no duplicate enable or permission preset.
kimi.sessionSetupRequired: Kimi Code could not create a session. Run `kimi`, complete `/login`, and confirm a model is configured.

opencode.commandsAndSkillsDesc: OpenCode can auto-detect vault-level Claude slash commands from .claude/commands/ and skills from .claude/skills/, .codex/skills/, and .agents/skills/. Manage those entries in the Claude or Codex settings tab. This setting only hides entries from the OpenCode dropdown.
opencode.hiddenCommandsAndSkillsDesc: Hide specific OpenCode commands and skills from the dropdown. Enter names without the leading slash, one per line.
opencode.subagentsDesc: Manage vault-level OpenCode subagents from .opencode/agent/ and legacy .opencode/agents/. New entries are saved as subagent-only files and appear in the @mention menu.
opencode.environmentVariablesDesc: Extra environment variables passed to OpenCode. `OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA=1` is enabled by default.

pi.environmentVariablesDesc: Environment variables passed only to Pi.

livePreviewComposer.name: Live Preview composer
livePreviewComposer.desc: Render supported Markdown and vault references while typing. Disable to use the plain text composer. Applies after reopening the chat view.

claude.authenticationRequired: Claude requires explicit API-key or supported cloud authentication.

enableProvider.name: Enable Claude provider
enableProvider.desc: When enabled, Claude models appear in the model selector for new conversations. Existing Claude sessions are preserved.

claudeServices.heading: Third-party model services
claudeServices.description: Connect Anthropic-compatible services through Claude. Enabled services appear in the chat model picker.
claudeServices.testing: Testing connection. This sends a minimal paid request.
claudeServices.deleteReferenced: This service is used by saved conversations. Disable it instead.
claudeServices.deleteConfirm: Delete this model service? Its SecretStorage entry will be kept.
claudeServices.costNotice: Connection tests send one minimal request and may incur provider charges.

fields.name: Service name
fields.urlDesc: Anthropic-compatible endpoint. HTTPS required except localhost.
fields.secretDesc: Select or create a key in Obsidian SecretStorage.
fields.lightModelDesc: Used for title generation and Haiku-class tasks.

validation.name: Service name is required.
validation.https: Use HTTPS, or HTTP only for localhost.
validation.secret: Select or create an API key in SecretStorage.
